title: HA Entity Inventory
description: Schema for the canonical Home Assistant entity registry produced by scripts/snapshot-inventory.ts

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the snapshot was taken

source.description: HA REST endpoint used to produce this snapshot

ha_url.description: Base URL of the Home Assistant instance (no trailing slash)

entity_id.description: Canonical HA entity identifier in domain.object format

friendly_name.description: Human-readable label shown in the HA UI

domain.description: HA domain extracted from entity_id (light, switch, sensor, binary_sensor, etc.)

state.description: Last known state string at time of snapshot (on, off, unavailable, etc.)

area.description: Logical area name from HA area registry, if available

device_id.description: HA device registry ID, if present in entity attributes

integration.description: Integration / platform that owns this entity (e.g. zha, mqtt, lifx)

platform.description: HA platform string from entity attributes, if present

aliases.description: Optional list of alternative human names used by the resolver (Step 2)
